title: Black Power: A British Story of Resistance
original_title: Black Power: A British Story of Resistance
overview: An examination of the Black Power movement in the late 1960s in the UK, surveying both the individuals and the cultural forces that defined the era.  At the heart of the documentary is a series of astonishing interviews with past activists, many of whom are speaking for the first time about what it was really like to be involved in the British Black Power movement, bringing to life one of the key cultural revolutions in the history of the nation.
